title: NCB Seizes Ganja in Multi-State Operation, Disrupts Supply Chain
author: Unknown
key_facts: NCB Chennai Zonal Unit, in coordination with Telangana Police, intercepted a container truck on May 12 near Chennai.
Contraband ganja was found concealed within a false ceiling and hidden cavities of the seized vehicle.
The ganja was being transported from Malkangiri district in Odisha and was allegedly headed for Madurai in Tamil Nadu.
Individuals arrested in connection with the seizure are natives of Odisha and Bihar.
The operation successfully disrupted a major drug supply chain operating between Odisha-Andhra Pradesh and Tamil Nadu.
Efforts are under way to apprehend the alleged mastermind and owner of the seized vehicle, traced to Odisha.
Further investigation is in progress to identify other syndicate members and trace financial transactions.
